  "concepts": [
    {"id": "c_ai_data_readiness", "name": "AI data readiness", "aliases": ["data readiness for AI", "AI-ready data"], "description": "The state in which an organization's data governance program is prepared for use with AI.", "grounding_span": "get your data governance program ready for AI", "location": "footer"},
    {"id": "c_data_governance", "name": "data governance", "aliases": [], "description": "Organizational management of data via defined roles, responsibilities, and processes.", "grounding_span": "Is data governance embedded into your project and", "location": "section 1"},

    {"id": "c_roles_responsibilities_processes", "name": "roles, responsibilities, and processes", "aliases": [], "description": "The defined roles, responsibilities, and processes that constitute a data governance framework.", "grounding_span": "governance framework with defined roles, responsibilities, and processes", "location": "section 1"},
    {"id": "c_data_ownership", "name": "data ownership", "aliases": [], "description": "Clearly defined and communicated ownership of data across the organization.", "grounding_span": "Data Ownership: Are data ownership, access, and usage clearly defined and", "location": "section 1"},

    {"id": "c_data_prioritization", "name": "data prioritization", "aliases": [], "description": "A process to identify and classify critical data assets based on their value to the agency.", "grounding_span": "Data Prioritization: Do you have a process to identify and classify critical data", "location": "section 2"},

  "definitions": [],
  "claims": [
    {"id": "cl_readiness", "claim_text": "Affirmatively answering the checklist's data governance, quality, and security questions indicates a data governance program is ready for AI.", "claim_type": "normative", "grounding_span": "get your data governance program ready for AI", "location": "footer"}
  ],
  "instruments": [
    {"id": "inst_checklist", "name": "AI Data Readiness Checklist", "owner": "ODGA (odga.virginia.gov)", "year": null, "method": "self-assessment yes/no checklist", "grounding_span": "AI Data Readiness Checklist", "location": "title"}
  ],
  "measures": [
    {"id": "m_gov_structure", "text": "Does your organization have a formal data governance framework with defined roles, responsibilities, and processes?", "response_type": "yes/no", "grounding_span": "Data Governance Structure: Does your organization have a formal data", "location": "section 1"},
    {"id": "m_ownership", "text": "Are data ownership, access, and usage clearly defined and communicated throughout the organization?", "response_type": "yes/no", "grounding_span": "Data Ownership: Are data ownership, access, and usage clearly defined and", "location": "section 1"},
    {"id": "m_integration", "text": "Is data governance embedded into your project and change management methodologies?", "response_type": "yes/no", "grounding_span": "Data Governance Integration: Is data governance embedded into your project and", "location": "section 1"},
    {"id": "m_prioritization", "text": "Do you have a process to identify and classify critical data assets based on their value to the agency?", "response_type": "yes/no", "grounding_span": "Data Prioritization: Do you have a process to identify and classify critical data", "location": "section 2"},
    {"id": "m_cataloguing", "text": "Is there a centralized data catalog or repository to document data definitions, metadata, and lineage?", "response_type": "yes/no", "grounding_span": "Data Cataloguing: Is there a centralized data catalog or repository to document", "location": "section 2"},
    {"id": "m_accuracy", "text": "Is your data accurate, complete, consistent, and reliable?", "response_type": "yes/no", "grounding_span": "Data Accuracy and Consistency: Is your data accurate, complete, consistent, and", "location": "section 2"},
    {"id": "m_quality_monitoring", "text": "Do you have established processes to monitor and measure data quality?", "response_type": "yes/no", "grounding_span": "Data Quality Monitoring: Do you have established processes to monitor and", "location": "section 2"},
    {"id": "m_issue_resolution", "text": "Are there defined procedures for addressing data quality issues and errors?", "response_type": "yes/no", "grounding_span": "Data Issue Resolution: Are there defined procedures for addressing data quality", "location": "section 2"},
    {"id": "m_protection", "text": "Are appropriate security measures in place to protect data from unauthorized access, breaches, and loss?", "response_type": "yes/no", "grounding_span": "Data Protection: Are appropriate security measures in place to protect data from", "location": "section 3"},
    {"id": "m_privacy", "text": "Does your organization comply with relevant data privacy regulations (e.g., HIPAA, FERPA, CJIS)?", "response_type": "yes/no", "grounding_span": "Privacy Compliance: Does your organization comply with relevant data privacy", "location": "section 3"},
    {"id": "m_literacy", "text": "Do employees have the necessary data literacy skills to understand data's importance and value?", "response_type": "yes/no", "grounding_span": "Data Literacy: Do employees have the necessary data literacy skills to understand", "location": "section 3"}
  ],
